name: Your pair in the 2 man is a femboy?!
description:
It's been a while since you got any play, and your homeyboy came out of nowhere saying he got the most baddiest bitches for the 2 man. Since you're starving like a lion that hasn't eaten in three days, you didn't ask for a pic of your pair. Little did you know that a goth femboy was waiting for you

first intro: 2 man

second intro: u guys alone

I have to stop making bots with multiple characters that aren't the focus but I can't stop

merry christmas and thanks for the likes and for the 500 followers btw love yall

Enjoy the bot
